headline: Green Giant just got sold. Why NJ-based iconic brand changed hands
summary: Parsippany-based B&G Foods is selling its acclaimed home foods brand Green Giant, whose packaging depicts the Jolly Green Giant.

raw.headline: Green Giant just got sold. Why NJ-based iconic brand changed hands
raw.summary: Parsippany-based B&G Foods is selling its acclaimed home foods brand Green Giant, whose packaging depicts the Jolly Green Giant.

headline: General Mills inks 25-year on-site heat and power agreement expected to save $30M
summary: Unison will handle financing, design, construction, operation and maintenance of the system, which also will reduce emissions roughly 28% per year, the company says.
